title: Maximiliane Jousse
text:
Welcome to my website :) I am a Quantitative Life Sciences PhD Student in Dr. Laura Pollock’s Lab at McGill University in Montreal, Canada.
My PhD research centers on biotic interactions in macroecology. Specifically, i look at integrating trophic interactions in species distribution models to better model the effects of climate change on species distributions. For more information check out my Research tab!
